unmutableGraph(Graph) - 类中的静态方法 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.Graphs
 
unregister(String) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMIAdapterOut
 
unregister(String) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMISink
 
unregisterEdge(EdgeSpring) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.NodeParticle
The given edge is no more connected to this node.
unregisterFromSource() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.thread.ThreadProxyPipe
Ask the proxy to unregister from the event input source (stop receive events) as soon as possible (when the next event will occur in the graph).
unsafeGet(int) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.util.set.FixedArrayList
I-th element.
update(int, Point3) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.ConnectorSkeleton
Change the i-th point in the set of points making up the shape of this edge.
updateCurrentSpell(double) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.util.cumulative.CumulativeSpells
 
updateDate(double) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.util.cumulative.CumulativeAttributes
 
URI - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGEXF.GEXFConstants.NODESHAPEAttribute
 
url() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParser
 
URL - 接口中的静态变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParserConstants
RegularExpression Id.
URLSource - org.graphstream.stream.net中的接口
Graph event input source from an URL.
usage() - 类中的静态方法 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkImages
 
userView() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.DefaultCamera2D
Compute a transformation that pass from graph units (user space) to a pixel units (device space) so that the view (zoom and center) requested by the user is produced.
UTC_OFFSET - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.util.time.ISODateComponent
